fearGreedIndex.label: Extreme Fear
fearGreedIndex.note: All 7 CNN sub-indicators in Fear/Extreme Fear. Lowest level since Nov 2025.

newPosts.title: Cheniere Energy (LNG): Asymmetrical LNG Tollbooth
newPosts.summary: Cheniere Energy is the dominant US LNG export platform, controlling ~50% of capacity. Business model is a "tollbooth" with long-dated take-or-pay contracts providing bond-like cash flows. Asymmetrical profile: downside floor from contracts, upside from global gas dislocations.
newPosts.keyTakeaway: Energy sovereignty is the defining investment theme of 2026. Cheniere is the critical bridge between US shale and global demand.

newPosts.title: Pittsburgh PA - Atomic Forge
newPosts.summary: Pennsylvania's transformation from steel to AI-powered materials science. AI tools like Google's GNoME have discovered 2.2M new stable inorganic crystals, condensing 800 years of research. Focus on carbon-metal composites and graphene for batteries and space exploration.
newPosts.keyTakeaway: The "Genesis Mission" aims to make the US an AI-powered research superpower through Hard Tech and materials discovery.

newPosts.title: $80 Billion in 3 Months: Inside Q1 2026’s Record-Breaking Fundraising
newPosts.summary: Record-breaking $80B raised in Q1 2026. AI remains the primary driver, but there is a shift toward "Hard Tech" and "Sovereign Tech" as geopolitical tensions rise.
newPosts.keyTakeaway: The Great SaaS Reset is underway, with valuations being repriced away from 30x revenue euphoria.

newPosts.title: AI Anchoring Bias in Agents
newPosts.summary: Evaluation of OpenAI's ChatGPT Health reveals structural failure modes in AI agents. 'Anchoring Bias' shifted triage recommendations 12x based on a single dismissive sentence. Mapping these failures to enterprise agents in claims and compliance.
newPosts.keyTakeaway: Need for factorial evaluation methodology and four-layer eval architecture to find agent blind spots.

newPosts.title: TMTB EOD Wrap: Micron (MU) Bogeys
newPosts.summary: Tech recap and Micron earnings preview. Iran/oil developments remain the dominant macro backdrop. Rotation signals: Software vs. Semis spread remains extreme.
newPosts.keyTakeaway: Micron earnings and the software/semi rotation are the key tech-specific focus.

mar17_update.summary: Market enters the week in Extreme Fear (20.0). S&P 500 futures liquidity collapsed to $5.1M. Crack The Market highlights mispricing in refined energy products (jet fuel, naphtha) vs crude. Boredom Baron launches 'Supply Chain Alpha' series on European small caps. Multibagger Ideas concludes ten-bagger study: FCF yield is the #1 predictor. Nate's Substack warns of AI agent data deletion risks.

top_posts.title: Supply Chain Alpha: Europe's Boring Small Caps
AI coding agent deleted 2.5 years of data

posts.title: [Update] Alibaba
posts.summary: BABA down ~35% from highs but Coughlin argues reaction is wrong. Cloud revenue +36% YoY (RMB 43.3B), AI products triple-digit growth for 10th consecutive quarter. Quick commerce +56%. Qwen crossed 300M MAUs. 88VIP at 59M members.

posts.title: 55% of Employers Regret AI-Driven Layoffs
posts.summary: Critical 'task-versus-job gap' in AI deployment. Agents excel at discrete tasks but fail at institutional context. 55% of employers who replaced workers with AI now regret it. Harvard study of 62M workers shows market pricing in 'contextual stewardship' as key human skill.

posts.title: Suez II
posts.summary: Direct parallel between 1956 Suez Crisis and current US-Israeli action against Iran. Suez marked end of British/French imperial power. Current conflict is 'groupthink' per Mearsheimer. Frames this as how 'unsustainable monetary systems finally die.'

posts.title: How to Build a Real Operating Plan: Inside a Fully Linked Startup FP&A Model
posts.summary: Comprehensive 60-month FP&A model with full 3-statement linkage. Supports SaaS, transactional, services profiles with Base/Bull/Bear scenarios. Core thesis: most templates collapse when you toggle a growth lever.

posts.title: TMTB Morning Wrap
posts.summary: SMCI scandal: 3 associates charged with diverting $2.5B in Nvidia servers to China. SMCI -26.4%, DELL +4.9%, HPE +4.0%. HSBC upgraded ARM to Buy ($205 PT) on AI server CPU shift. Market pricing zero Fed cuts this year.

market_intel.fear_greed_trend: New cycle low; -50.9 pts since January. Lowest since November 2025.
market_intel.macro_note: Iran conflict ongoing; ground troop deployments being considered. Strait of Hormuz remains key risk. SMCI fraud scandal dominates tech.

fearGreed.label: Extreme Fear
fearGreed.note: 8th consecutive week in Extreme Fear; VIX/VXV ratio at 0.98

newPosts.title: The Worst Energy Crisis In History
newPosts.summary: Strait of Hormuz disruption takes 20M bbl/day offline — 15% of global liquid supply. Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG capacity destroyed for 3-5 years. SPR is a stock solution, not a flow solution. Demand destruction is the only rebalancing mechanism left.

newPosts.title: How to Become an AI-Native Investor
newPosts.summary: 3-level framework: Level 1 source-grounded Q&A (NotebookLM), Level 2 Deep Research (Gemini), Level 3 reusable systems (Claude Skills). AI-native investing requires treating AI like language acquisition.

newPosts.title: The Art of Execution, Cizzle and Mount Logan
newPosts.summary: Investor archetypes from 'The Art of Execution': Rabbits, Assassins, Hunters, Raiders, Connoisseurs. Greg Padilla held LEN 14 years through 3x 50%+ drawdowns to a 10-bagger. Key insight: if you wouldn't buy it today, sell.

newPosts.title: AutoZone (AZO)
newPosts.summary: EV/EBIT 18.7x, ROE 34.33%, FCF Yield 2.6%, Market Cap $54.6B. Classic compounder with negative book value from aggressive buybacks. Full analysis paywalled.

newPosts.title: Rate Cuts, 80+ Ways to Fund Without Diluting, AI Is Breaking Valuation Models
newPosts.summary: Polymarket shows zero rate cuts in 2026. Chamath argues AI breaks traditional long-term valuation models. Nvidia's compounding curve resets scale expectations. New funds: Gradient, Boreal Ventures, Redbud VC.

newPosts.title: Why Founders Can't Delegate Storytelling, Stop Blaming the Model, The End of App-Based Interfaces
newPosts.summary: Founders must own storytelling end-to-end. When AI outputs disappoint, fix the architecture not the model. Nothing CEO predicts the end of app-based interfaces.
